Body percussion brain-health practice

IDance-Cog

Practice randomized body percussion patterns with adjustable tempo, a clear 3-2-1 countdown, percussive soundtracks, and animated movement cards designed to support reaction time, body-mind coordination, rhythm, and playful cognitive-motor training.

Ready
Ready to practice
1

Four movement boxes

The desktop layout keeps four movement boxes in one row from left to right. Each movement card is its own separate GIF animation, and the app advances one card per beat with percussive soundtrack options.

Practice tips

  • Start with a slow tempo, then increase gradually.
  • Practice seated or standing near a stable support.
  • Say the movement name aloud for extra cognitive challenge.
  • Stop if movement causes pain, dizziness, or shortness of breath.
Practice controls Stopped

Tempo slider changes playback speed.

IDance-Cog prototype · Single-file app · Client-side only · Four-in-a-row animated movement cards · One beat per card · Tempo-adjustable soundtracks
